name: tier-b/elixir/02-custom-apps-path
description: Custom apps_path respected literally: apps_path: "lib" + 2 lib/<name>/mix.exs subdirectories produce 2 package roots.

manifests.mix.exs:
defmodule CustomUmbrella.MixProject do
  use Mix.Project

  def project do
    [
      apps_path: "lib",
      version: "0.1.0",
      start_permanent: Mix.env() == :prod,
      deps: []
    ]
  end
end
manifests.lib/foo/mix.exs:
defmodule Foo.MixProject do
  use Mix.Project

  def project do
    [
      app: :foo,
      version: "0.1.0",
      build_path: "../../_build",
      deps_path: "../../deps",
      lockfile: "../../mix.lock",
      elixir: "~> 1.15",
      deps: []
    ]
  end
end
manifests.lib/bar/mix.exs:
defmodule Bar.MixProject do
  use Mix.Project

  def project do
    [
      app: :bar,
      version: "0.1.0",
      build_path: "../../_build",
      deps_path: "../../deps",
      lockfile: "../../mix.lock",
      elixir: "~> 1.15",
      deps: []
    ]
  end
end
